UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson Fatally Shot Outside NYC Hotel (UPDATED)
data.description: Brian Thompson, CEO of UnitedHealthcare insurance division, was fatally shot outside the New York Hilton Midtown in Manhattan, where the company is hosting an investor day.

data.title: 'Ethereum Killer' Hyperliquid Explodes For 274% 7-Day Gain, Could Create 'More Millionaires Than Microsoft At This Rate,' Trader Says
data.description: Hyperliquid (CRYPTO: HYPE) is soaring on bullish sentiment on Wednesday, gaining 274% in just a week, as traders and developers praise its innovative model and transformative community impact.
